rows.label: qev027006MSG0001
rows.name: Welcome back, jan... Good work, jan... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0002
rows.name:
I hear you defeated the enemy, jan.
That's a joyous occasion, jan. But... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0003
rows.name: A minor problem has occurred, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0004
rows.name:
............I was told to hand
over consolation money, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0005
rows.name:
I was told that by none other
than Heradot, who is standing
right behind me, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0006
rows.name:
I'm so mad, I'm so mad. Seriously,
I'm just so mad, dawayo~! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0007
rows.name:
It seems that after everything, she's no
longer amused by our plan to use her as a
target to find the enemy's location, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0008
rows.name:
To be blunt, thinking about it
carefully, it's super annoying!
That kind of thing, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0009
rows.name:
So she's demanding a lifetime supply
of pizza money as consolation, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0010
rows.name: That's a massive sum of money, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0011
rows.name:
It's your fault this happened
since you proposed the plan,
jan! Take responsibility, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0012
rows.name:
Take responsibility and go earn 500,000G
for a lifetime supply of pizza, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006_JNK0010
rows.name: Procure Funds[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006_SEL0011
rows.name: Earn the pizza money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006_JNK0020
rows.name: Propose Alternative[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006_SEL0021
rows.name: Think of another method.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0013
rows.name: You catch on quick, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0014
rows.name:
Well, you reap what you sow, jan! It's
only natural to provide aftercare, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0015
rows.name:
Aftercare is the foundation
of business, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0016
rows.name:
You're reluctant to resolve
this with money, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0017
rows.name:
Explain with sincerity and apologize,
jan? Is that what you Earthlings
say is the best way, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0018
rows.name:
No good, jan. No good, jan.
Absolutely no good, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0019
rows.name:
That kind of logic doesn't
work on Ma-non, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0020
rows.name:
Showing sincerity through money
first is the primary step for
smooth relations, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0021
rows.name:
You might think it's greedy to
only talk about money, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0022
rows.name:
Properly settling things on paper like this
actually keeps problems from happening later
on, making things much cleaner, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0023
rows.name:
So, just give up and go earn
the pizza money, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0024
rows.name:
Come back here once you've
saved up 500,000G, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0025
rows.name:
There's no need to wrap it in
anything, so just hand the consolation
money straight to Heradot, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0026
rows.name: That's fine with you, Heradot, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0027
rows.name: I'm so mad, I'm so mad. Okay, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0028
rows.name:
Negotiation successful, jan! Now
go and make sure you earn that
500,000G pizza money, jaaan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0029
rows.name:
The required consolation
money is 500,000G, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027006MSG0030
rows.name:
Earn it properly and pay it to
Heradot. I'm counting on you, jaaan! [ST:wait ]
